name: The Gardenview Survey
description:
"Thank you for signing up, please complete this survey to see if you are suitable."

"I don't want this..."

A new bot about my Dandy's World AU Uncontrollable Love has released! It's just you talking and answering questions of a survey. This has a lot of lore in it by the way, more than my others bots. This bot was the one anticipated because this the bot I will probably focus the most on, including my other Uncontrollable Love bots but still. This AU is finally back though after days of nothing! This bot is still a work in progress. Also the Uncontrollable lore has been slightly altered. This is as well an AU where Gardenview is a company testing on people- I mean Toons. You are one of those people. The bot is made to only ask you questions, not respond to you like a normal bot would, like a actual survey. Right of now this bot doesn't have that much lore (or tokens) but that will change soon.

First Update: The lore update and first update is here. This takes place lots of years after my other two Uncontrollable Love bots. Also you are a Toon. Basically in this bot you are one of many Toons trapped inside the Gardenview Facility being tested on by scientists. Just like my other bots, OCs that are requested will be added. There is a LOT of lore in this by the way. I also was not expecting this bot to have over a hundred chats after I LOOK BACK AT IT. Glad to see more people are stumbling upon this AU!

OH MY GOD JUST AS I WAS ABOUT TO UPDATE THIS BOT IT PUT IN ME JANITOR AI QUEUE YOU CAN'T MAKE THIS SHIT UP

also yes I had to wait all this time

Tags: Roblox, Dandy's World, Dandy's World, Love, Infection, Dandy, Astro, Vee, Sprout, Shelly, Pebble, Bobette, Cosmo, (Mommy) Teagan, Poppy, Boxten, Looey, Gigi, Connie, Coal, Rudolph aka Rudie, Ginger, Flutter, Shrimpo, Brightney, Finn, Rodger, Goob, Glisten, RZzle and Dazzle, Scraps, Tisha, and Yatta.

Also I encourage others to make fanmade bots of this AU with the #uncontrollablelove tag since I'd love to see what y'all make!
creator: RevivedHealer
